heading: Service Nodes
subtitle: Service nodes make your domains reachable over the TNP overlay network -- no port forwarding or public IP needed.
noNodeConfigured: No service node configured. See the setup instructions below.

setup.heading: Setup Instructions
setup.intro: To expose a local service through the TNP overlay network, run the TNP client in serve mode. Your service becomes reachable at your domain without port forwarding or a public IP.
setup.step3Desc: Run tnp auth login to authenticate with your Oxy account. The token is stored locally and used for subsequent commands.
setup.footer: The service node registers with a relay server and accepts incoming connections over encrypted tunnels. Replace <code1>example.ox</code1> with your actual domain and <code2>localhost:80</code2> with the local address of your service.
